headline: Broadcom announces the retirement of CFO Kirsten M. Spears and the appointment of former Alphabet executive Amie Thuener as the new CFO, effective June 12, 2026.
investor_impact: The appointment of a seasoned mega-cap tech executive from Alphabet signals strong continued financial leadership for Broadcom. The extended consulting agreement with the outgoing CFO ensures an orderly transition, minimizing execution risk and maintaining investor confidence.
